context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the ecto-essentials instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before modifying ANY schema, query, or migration.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never combine schema changes and data backfill** in the same migration

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Define schemas with proper types and associations. The example below shows a child schema with `belongs_to`; a parent schema uses `has_many` in the same pattern (see `Folder` in the migration section for reference).

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write clear, reversible migrations. After writing a migration, always validate it with the steps below.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `mix ecto.migrate` — confirm it applies without errors

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `mix ecto.rollback` — confirm it reverses cleanly

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `mix ecto.migrate` again — confirm re-applying succeeds

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never call Repo from the web layer** (LiveViews, controllers) — all database operations belong in context modules.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Do not invoke this skill** for simple read-only schema inspection or introspection (use `mix ecto.schema` directly instead)

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Do not use this skill** for raw SQL queries that bypass Ecto entirely — write raw SQL in a dedicated repo method, not inline in contexts
